nasb.text: Damascus was your customer because of the abundance of your goods, because of the abundance of all kinds of wealth, because of the wine of Helbon and white wool.

esv.text: Damascus did business with you for your abundant goods, because of your great wealth of every kind; wine of Helbon and wool of Sahar

cnv.text: 大馬士革人因你產品很多，又因你各樣豐富的財物，就用黑本酒和白羊毛來與你交易，

ccb.text: 大马士革见你的货物丰富，就用黑本的酒和沙哈的羊毛来跟你交易。
